subject: Re: cutting your reporting time
body: This actually sounds interesting — we've been struggling with exactly this. I'd love to see a quick demo. Can you send a time to chat next week?

subject: Re: quick question
body: Appreciate the note, but honestly this looks too expensive for where we are right now, and we already use a competitor for most of this. Not a priority this quarter.

subject: Re: intro
body: I'm not the right person for this. You should reach out to Jordan Mills, our Head of Operations, at jordan.mills@vertexlabs.com or call 415-555-0142.

subject: Automatic reply: Re: intro
body: I am currently out of office on annual leave and will return on the 30th. For urgent matters contact my colleague.
